revision.text:
Welcome to the '''{{SITENAME}}'''! We're a collaborative community about {{topic}} created by fans and for fans like you! This wiki is an online encyclopedia which [[w:Help:Editing|anyone can edit]] and contribute to, [[Special:CreatePage|creating a new page]] or [[Special:AllPages|improving an existing one]]. If you're new and don't know where to start, feel free to reach out to one of our [[Special:ListUsers/sysop|administrators]] or check out [[w:Help:Getting Started|these Fandom help pages]]! ==Important articles== Wiki Product.jpeg|alt=Stylized text reading "PRODUCT LOGO" in bold, multi-colored letters with a vintage texture, set against a deep purple background filled with stars and abstract geometric shapes.|The name of the product Wiki Character.jpeg|alt=A knight wearing golden armor, holding a sword with a pink hilt pointing down. The background is a brown, hazy wooded area with a stone building.|The name of a character Wiki Episode.jpeg|alt=A detective in a trench coat and fedora holding a flashlight and magnifying glass, rendered in purple and blue tones with a halftone texture against a dark window backdrop.|The name of an episode Wiki Mission.jpeg|alt=Two swords clashing, one with a turquoise blade, the other dark blue. The background is a grey. barren, grassy area, with dead trees.|The name of a mission Wiki Location.jpeg|alt=A red and white striped lighthouse emitting beams of light made of white dots, set against a dark, textured sea and sky background.|The name of a location Wiki Object.jpeg|alt=A red ruby jewell, with a golden border. The background is a religious building with an alter, stained glass windows, and stone walls.|The name of an object [[w:Help:Galleries|Galleries]] with [[w:Help:Adding images|images]] are typically used to show and link to the main important content about your topic. You can link to specific pages or [[w:Help:Categories|categories]] about them, once you have created different ones. To start creating content, you can use these buttons for each one of the content pages:
type=create preload=Template:Product page buttonlabel=New product page width=25 type=create preload=Template:Character page buttonlabel=New character page width=25 type=create preload=Template:Episode page buttonlabel=New episode page width=25 type=create preload=Template:Mission page buttonlabel=New mission page width=25 type=create preload=Template:Location page buttonlabel=New location page width=25 type=create preload=Template:Object page buttonlabel=New object page width=25
==Track your progress== You can use different [[w:Help:Tables|tables]] to collect relevant information about the topic of the wiki and the related products. Be sure to add the [[w:Help:Table Progress Tracking|progress tracking feature]] where appropriate too! It allows all users to keep track of their personal progress related to missions to complete in a video game, episodes from a TV show, book chapters - whatever you can think of! {| class="wikitable sortable" |- ! Name !! Description !! Notes |- | Mission || You have to go to this location and defeat the main boss. Don't forget to prepare your weapons first. || Once defeated, you will be rewarded with a new weapon. |- | Episode || The main characters are going to get married, but a secret from the past will resurface. || Air date |- | Book chapter || In this chapter, the main conflict is starting to be solved. || The number of pages |- | Toy || This product is based on the character from the movie. || Price |} ==Interactive Map== [[w:Help:Interactive Maps|Interactive Maps]] are also a great way to represent the universe from the wiki topic. You can also add markers for points of interest like hidden treasures, boss locations, or quest givers, and use them to mark your progress. [[Special:AllMaps|Take a look at all the Interactive Maps on this wiki]]. ==About== This section serves as an introduction for visitors to the wiki, usually describing the IP itself. You can use it to explain the topic this community is about, [[w:Help:Links|adding links]] to the pages talking about the products or events, characters or real-life people who created the series or franchise. ==Join the conversation== '''Discussions''' is the central meeting place where you can connect with other fans. There you can share news, chat about trending topics, introduce your personal favorite character or content, and talk about what you love most. Ready to connect? [[Special:Forum|Head over to Discussions]] and start the conversation now! ==Helping out== ''Need help building out this community?'' *[[Project:Wiki rules|Rules of this wiki]] *[[Project:Policies|Policies of this wiki]] *[[Project:Accessibility checklist|Accessibility checklist]] *[[w:Help:Getting Started|Getting started]] *[[w:Help:Contributing|How to contribute]] *[[w:Help:Community Management|Managing your community]] *[[w:Help:Growing your wiki|Growing your wiki]] *[[w:Help:Contents|Guides]] *[[w:Help:Index|All Help articles]] You can also be part of the larger Fandom family of communities. Visit [[w:c:community|Fandom's Community Central]]! [[Category:{{SITENAME}}]] __NOTOC__ __noeditsection__ [[Category:Git synced pages]]

revision.comment: took fandom page for local editing, and later succeeding
revision.text:
Welcome to the '''{{SITENAME}}'''! We're a collaborative community about {{topic}} created by fans and for fans like you! This wiki is an online encyclopedia which [[w:Help:Editing|anyone can edit]] and contribute to, [[Special:CreatePage|creating a new page]] or [[Special:AllPages|improving an existing one]]. If you're new and don't know where to start, feel free to reach out to one of our [[Special:ListUsers/sysop|administrators]] or check out [[w:Help:Getting Started|these Fandom help pages]]! ==Important articles== Wiki Product.jpeg|alt=Stylized text reading "PRODUCT LOGO" in bold, multi-colored letters with a vintage texture, set against a deep purple background filled with stars and abstract geometric shapes.|The name of the product Wiki Character.jpeg|alt=A knight wearing golden armor, holding a sword with a pink hilt pointing down. The background is a brown, hazy wooded area with a stone building.|The name of a character Wiki Episode.jpeg|alt=A detective in a trench coat and fedora holding a flashlight and magnifying glass, rendered in purple and blue tones with a halftone texture against a dark window backdrop.|The name of an episode Wiki Mission.jpeg|alt=Two swords clashing, one with a turquoise blade, the other dark blue. The background is a grey. barren, grassy area, with dead trees.|The name of a mission Wiki Location.jpeg|alt=A red and white striped lighthouse emitting beams of light made of white dots, set against a dark, textured sea and sky background.|The name of a location Wiki Object.jpeg|alt=A red ruby jewell, with a golden border. The background is a religious building with an alter, stained glass windows, and stone walls.|The name of an object [[w:Help:Galleries|Galleries]] with [[w:Help:Adding images|images]] are typically used to show and link to the main important content about your topic. You can link to specific pages or [[w:Help:Categories|categories]] about them, once you have created different ones. To start creating content, you can use these buttons for each one of the content pages:
type=create preload=Template:Product page buttonlabel=New product page width=25 type=create preload=Template:Character page buttonlabel=New character page width=25 type=create preload=Template:Episode page buttonlabel=New episode page width=25 type=create preload=Template:Mission page buttonlabel=New mission page width=25 type=create preload=Template:Location page buttonlabel=New location page width=25 type=create preload=Template:Object page buttonlabel=New object page width=25
==Track your progress== You can use different [[w:Help:Tables|tables]] to collect relevant information about the topic of the wiki and the related products. Be sure to add the [[w:Help:Table Progress Tracking|progress tracking feature]] where appropriate too! It allows all users to keep track of their personal progress related to missions to complete in a video game, episodes from a TV show, book chapters - whatever you can think of! {| class="wikitable sortable" |- ! Name !! Description !! Notes |- | Mission || You have to go to this location and defeat the main boss. Don't forget to prepare your weapons first. || Once defeated, you will be rewarded with a new weapon. |- | Episode || The main characters are going to get married, but a secret from the past will resurface. || Air date |- | Book chapter || In this chapter, the main conflict is starting to be solved. || The number of pages |- | Toy || This product is based on the character from the movie. || Price |} ==Interactive Map== [[w:Help:Interactive Maps|Interactive Maps]] are also a great way to represent the universe from the wiki topic. You can also add markers for points of interest like hidden treasures, boss locations, or quest givers, and use them to mark your progress. [[Special:AllMaps|Take a look at all the Interactive Maps on this wiki]]. ==About== This section serves as an introduction for visitors to the wiki, usually describing the IP itself. You can use it to explain the topic this community is about, [[w:Help:Links|adding links]] to the pages talking about the products or events, characters or real-life people who created the series or franchise. ==Join the conversation== '''Discussions''' is the central meeting place where you can connect with other fans. There you can share news, chat about trending topics, introduce your personal favorite character or content, and talk about what you love most. Ready to connect? [[Special:Forum|Head over to Discussions]] and start the conversation now! ==Helping out== ''Need help building out this community?'' *[[Project:Wiki rules|Rules of this wiki]] *[[Project:Policies|Policies of this wiki]] *[[Project:Accessibility checklist|Accessibility checklist]] *[[w:Help:Getting Started|Getting started]] *[[w:Help:Contributing|How to contribute]] *[[w:Help:Community Management|Managing your community]] *[[w:Help:Growing your wiki|Growing your wiki]] *[[w:Help:Contents|Guides]] *[[w:Help:Index|All Help articles]] You can also be part of the larger Fandom family of communities. Visit [[w:c:community|Fandom's Community Central]]! [[Category:{{SITENAME}}]] __NOTOC__ __noeditsection__ [[Category:Git synced pages]]

Welcome to the '''{{SITENAME}}'''! We're a collaborative community about {{topic}} created by fans and for fans like you! This wiki is an online encyclopedia which [[w:Help:Editing|anyone can edit]] and contribute to, [[Special:CreatePage|creating a new page]] or [[Special:AllPages|improving an existing one]]. If you're new and don't know where to start, feel free to reach out to one of our [[Special:ListUsers/sysop|administrators]] or check out [[w:Help:Getting Started|these Fandom help pages]]! ==Important articles== Wiki Product.jpeg|alt=Stylized text reading "PRODUCT LOGO" in bold, multi-colored letters with a vintage texture, set against a deep purple background filled with stars and abstract geometric shapes.|The name of the product Wiki Character.jpeg|alt=A knight wearing golden armor, holding a sword with a pink hilt pointing down. The background is a brown, hazy wooded area with a stone building.|The name of a character Wiki Episode.jpeg|alt=A detective in a trench coat and fedora holding a flashlight and magnifying glass, rendered in purple and blue tones with a halftone texture against a dark window backdrop.|The name of an episode Wiki Mission.jpeg|alt=Two swords clashing, one with a turquoise blade, the other dark blue. The background is a grey. barren, grassy area, with dead trees.|The name of a mission Wiki Location.jpeg|alt=A red and white striped lighthouse emitting beams of light made of white dots, set against a dark, textured sea and sky background.|The name of a location Wiki Object.jpeg|alt=A red ruby jewell, with a golden border. The background is a religious building with an alter, stained glass windows, and stone walls.|The name of an object [[w:Help:Galleries|Galleries]] with [[w:Help:Adding images|images]] are typically used to show and link to the main important content about your topic. You can link to specific pages or [[w:Help:Categories|categories]] about them, once you have created different ones. To start creating content, you can use these buttons for each one of the content pages:
type=create preload=Template:Product page buttonlabel=New product page width=25 type=create preload=Template:Character page buttonlabel=New character page width=25 type=create preload=Template:Episode page buttonlabel=New episode page width=25 type=create preload=Template:Mission page buttonlabel=New mission page width=25 type=create preload=Template:Location page buttonlabel=New location page width=25 type=create preload=Template:Object page buttonlabel=New object page width=25
==Track your progress== You can use different [[w:Help:Tables|tables]] to collect relevant information about the topic of the wiki and the related products. Be sure to add the [[w:Help:Table Progress Tracking|progress tracking feature]] where appropriate too! It allows all users to keep track of their personal progress related to missions to complete in a video game, episodes from a TV show, book chapters - whatever you can think of! {| class="wikitable sortable" |- ! Name !! Description !! Notes |- | Mission || You have to go to this location and defeat the main boss. Don't forget to prepare your weapons first. || Once defeated, you will be rewarded with a new weapon. |- | Episode || The main characters are going to get married, but a secret from the past will resurface. || Air date |- | Book chapter || In this chapter, the main conflict is starting to be solved. || The number of pages |- | Toy || This product is based on the character from the movie. || Price |} ==Interactive Map== [[w:Help:Interactive Maps|Interactive Maps]] are also a great way to represent the universe from the wiki topic. You can also add markers for points of interest like hidden treasures, boss locations, or quest givers, and use them to mark your progress. [[Special:AllMaps|Take a look at all the Interactive Maps on this wiki]]. ==About== This section serves as an introduction for visitors to the wiki, usually describing the IP itself. You can use it to explain the topic this community is about, [[w:Help:Links|adding links]] to the pages talking about the products or events, characters or real-life people who created the series or franchise. ==Join the conversation== '''Discussions''' is the central meeting place where you can connect with other fans. There you can share news, chat about trending topics, introduce your personal favorite character or content, and talk about what you love most. Ready to connect? [[Special:Forum|Head over to Discussions]] and start the conversation now! ==Helping out== ''Need help building out this community?'' *[[Project:Wiki rules|Rules of this wiki]] *[[Project:Policies|Policies of this wiki]] *[[Project:Accessibility checklist|Accessibility checklist]] *[[w:Help:Getting Started|Getting started]] *[[w:Help:Contributing|How to contribute]] *[[w:Help:Community Management|Managing your community]] *[[w:Help:Growing your wiki|Growing your wiki]] *[[w:Help:Contents|Guides]] *[[w:Help:Index|All Help articles]] You can also be part of the larger Fandom family of communities. Visit [[w:c:community|Fandom's Community Central]]! [[Category:{{SITENAME}}]] __NOTOC__ __noeditsection__ [[Category:Git synced pages]]

Welcome to the '''{{SITENAME}}'''! We're a collaborative community about [[Shinto]] created by fans and for fans like you! This wiki is an online encyclopedia which [[w:Help:Editing|anyone can edit]] and contribute to, [[Special:CreatePage|creating a new page]] or [[Special:AllPages|improving an existing one]]. If you're new and don't know where to start, feel free to reach out to one of our [[Special:ListUsers/sysop|administrators]] or check out [[w:Help:Getting Started|these Fandom help pages]]! ==Important articles== Wiki Product.jpeg|alt=Stylized text reading "PRODUCT LOGO" in bold, multi-colored letters with a vintage texture, set against a deep purple background filled with stars and abstract geometric shapes.|The name of the product Wiki Character.jpeg|alt=A knight wearing golden armor, holding a sword with a pink hilt pointing down. The background is a brown, hazy wooded area with a stone building.|The name of a character Wiki Episode.jpeg|alt=A detective in a trench coat and fedora holding a flashlight and magnifying glass, rendered in purple and blue tones with a halftone texture against a dark window backdrop.|The name of an episode Wiki Mission.jpeg|alt=Two swords clashing, one with a turquoise blade, the other dark blue. The background is a grey. barren, grassy area, with dead trees.|The name of a mission Wiki Location.jpeg|alt=A red and white striped lighthouse emitting beams of light made of white dots, set against a dark, textured sea and sky background.|The name of a location Wiki Object.jpeg|alt=A red ruby jewell, with a golden border. The background is a religious building with an alter, stained glass windows, and stone walls.|The name of an object [[w:Help:Galleries|Galleries]] with [[w:Help:Adding images|images]] are typically used to show and link to the main important content about your topic. You can link to specific pages or [[w:Help:Categories|categories]] about them, once you have created different ones. To start creating content, you can use these buttons for each one of the content pages:
type=create preload=Template:Product page buttonlabel=New product page width=25 type=create preload=Template:Character page buttonlabel=New character page width=25 type=create preload=Template:Episode page buttonlabel=New episode page width=25 type=create preload=Template:Mission page buttonlabel=New mission page width=25 type=create preload=Template:Location page buttonlabel=New location page width=25 type=create preload=Template:Object page buttonlabel=New object page width=25
==Track your progress== You can use different [[w:Help:Tables|tables]] to collect relevant information about the topic of the wiki and the related products. Be sure to add the [[w:Help:Table Progress Tracking|progress tracking feature]] where appropriate too! It allows all users to keep track of their personal progress related to missions to complete in a video game, episodes from a TV show, book chapters - whatever you can think of! {| class="wikitable sortable" |- ! Name !! Description !! Notes |- | Mission || You have to go to this location and defeat the main boss. Don't forget to prepare your weapons first. || Once defeated, you will be rewarded with a new weapon. |- | Episode || The main characters are going to get married, but a secret from the past will resurface. || Air date |- | Book chapter || In this chapter, the main conflict is starting to be solved. || The number of pages |- | Toy || This product is based on the character from the movie. || Price |} ==Interactive Map== [[w:Help:Interactive Maps|Interactive Maps]] are also a great way to represent the universe from the wiki topic. You can also add markers for points of interest like hidden treasures, boss locations, or quest givers, and use them to mark your progress. [[Special:AllMaps|Take a look at all the Interactive Maps on this wiki]]. ==About== This section serves as an introduction for visitors to the wiki, usually describing the IP itself. You can use it to explain the topic this community is about, [[w:Help:Links|adding links]] to the pages talking about the products or events, characters or real-life people who created the series or franchise. ==Join the conversation== '''Discussions''' is the central meeting place where you can connect with other fans. There you can share news, chat about trending topics, introduce your personal favorite character or content, and talk about what you love most. Ready to connect? [[Special:Forum|Head over to Discussions]] and start the conversation now! ==Helping out== ''Need help building out this community?'' *[[Project:Wiki rules|Rules of this wiki]] *[[Project:Policies|Policies of this wiki]] *[[Project:Accessibility checklist|Accessibility checklist]] *[[w:Help:Getting Started|Getting started]] *[[w:Help:Contributing|How to contribute]] *[[w:Help:Community Management|Managing your community]] *[[w:Help:Growing your wiki|Growing your wiki]] *[[w:Help:Contents|Guides]] *[[w:Help:Index|All Help articles]] You can also be part of the larger Fandom family of communities. Visit [[w:c:community|Fandom's Community Central]]! [[Category:{{SITENAME}}]] __NOTOC__ __noeditsection__ [[Category:Git synced pages]]

Welcome to the '''{{SITENAME}}'''! We're a collaborative community about [[Shinto]] created by fans and for fans like you! This wiki is an online encyclopedia which [[w:Help:Editing|anyone can edit]] and contribute to, [[Special:CreatePage|creating a new page]] or [[Special:AllPages|improving an existing one]]. If you're new and don't know where to start, feel free to reach out to one of our [[Special:ListUsers/sysop|administrators]] or check out [[w:Help:Getting Started|these Fandom help pages]]! ==Important articles== Itsukushima Gate.jpg|alt=Stylized text reading "PRODUCT LOGO" in bold, multi-colored letters with a vintage texture, set against a deep purple background filled with stars and abstract geometric shapes.|The name of the product Wiki Character.jpeg|alt=A knight wearing golden armor, holding a sword with a pink hilt pointing down. The background is a brown, hazy wooded area with a stone building.|The name of a character Wiki Episode.jpeg|alt=A detective in a trench coat and fedora holding a flashlight and magnifying glass, rendered in purple and blue tones with a halftone texture against a dark window backdrop.|The name of an episode Wiki Mission.jpeg|alt=Two swords clashing, one with a turquoise blade, the other dark blue. The background is a grey. barren, grassy area, with dead trees.|The name of a mission Wiki Location.jpeg|alt=A red and white striped lighthouse emitting beams of light made of white dots, set against a dark, textured sea and sky background.|The name of a location Wiki Object.jpeg|alt=A red ruby jewell, with a golden border. The background is a religious building with an alter, stained glass windows, and stone walls.|The name of an object [[w:Help:Galleries|Galleries]] with [[w:Help:Adding images|images]] are typically used to show and link to the main important content about your topic. You can link to specific pages or [[w:Help:Categories|categories]] about them, once you have created different ones. To start creating content, you can use these buttons for each one of the content pages:
type=create preload=Template:Product page buttonlabel=New product page width=25 type=create preload=Template:Character page buttonlabel=New character page width=25 type=create preload=Template:Episode page buttonlabel=New episode page width=25 type=create preload=Template:Mission page buttonlabel=New mission page width=25 type=create preload=Template:Location page buttonlabel=New location page width=25 type=create preload=Template:Object page buttonlabel=New object page width=25
==Track your progress== You can use different [[w:Help:Tables|tables]] to collect relevant information about the topic of the wiki and the related products. Be sure to add the [[w:Help:Table Progress Tracking|progress tracking feature]] where appropriate too! It allows all users to keep track of their personal progress related to missions to complete in a video game, episodes from a TV show, book chapters - whatever you can think of! {| class="wikitable sortable" |- ! Name !! Description !! Notes |- | Mission || You have to go to this location and defeat the main boss. Don't forget to prepare your weapons first. || Once defeated, you will be rewarded with a new weapon. |- | Episode || The main characters are going to get married, but a secret from the past will resurface. || Air date |- | Book chapter || In this chapter, the main conflict is starting to be solved. || The number of pages |- | Toy || This product is based on the character from the movie. || Price |} ==Interactive Map== [[w:Help:Interactive Maps|Interactive Maps]] are also a great way to represent the universe from the wiki topic. You can also add markers for points of interest like hidden treasures, boss locations, or quest givers, and use them to mark your progress. [[Special:AllMaps|Take a look at all the Interactive Maps on this wiki]]. ==About== This section serves as an introduction for visitors to the wiki, usually describing the IP itself. You can use it to explain the topic this community is about, [[w:Help:Links|adding links]] to the pages talking about the products or events, characters or real-life people who created the series or franchise. ==Join the conversation== '''Discussions''' is the central meeting place where you can connect with other fans. There you can share news, chat about trending topics, introduce your personal favorite character or content, and talk about what you love most. Ready to connect? [[Special:Forum|Head over to Discussions]] and start the conversation now! ==Helping out== ''Need help building out this community?'' *[[Project:Wiki rules|Rules of this wiki]] *[[Project:Policies|Policies of this wiki]] *[[Project:Accessibility checklist|Accessibility checklist]] *[[w:Help:Getting Started|Getting started]] *[[w:Help:Contributing|How to contribute]] *[[w:Help:Community Management|Managing your community]] *[[w:Help:Growing your wiki|Growing your wiki]] *[[w:Help:Contents|Guides]] *[[w:Help:Index|All Help articles]] You can also be part of the larger Fandom family of communities. Visit [[w:c:community|Fandom's Community Central]]! [[Category:{{SITENAME}}]] __NOTOC__ __noeditsection__ [[Category:Git synced pages]]

Welcome to the '''{{SITENAME}}'''! We're a collaborative community about [[Shinto]] created by fans and for fans like you! This wiki is an online encyclopedia which [[w:Help:Editing|anyone can edit]] and contribute to, [[Special:CreatePage|creating a new page]] or [[Special:AllPages|improving an existing one]]. If you're new and don't know where to start, feel free to reach out to one of our [[Special:ListUsers/sysop|administrators]] or check out [[w:Help:Getting Started|these Fandom help pages]]! ==Important articles== Itsukushima Gate.jpg|alt=Stylized text reading "PRODUCT LOGO" in bold, multi-colored letters with a vintage texture, set against a deep purple background filled with stars and abstract geometric shapes.|The name of the product Amaterasu cave crop.jpg|alt=A knight wearing golden armor, holding a sword with a pink hilt pointing down. The background is a brown, hazy wooded area with a stone building.|The name of a character Wiki Episode.jpeg|alt=A detective in a trench coat and fedora holding a flashlight and magnifying glass, rendered in purple and blue tones with a halftone texture against a dark window backdrop.|The name of an episode Wiki Mission.jpeg|alt=Two swords clashing, one with a turquoise blade, the other dark blue. The background is a grey. barren, grassy area, with dead trees.|The name of a mission Wiki Location.jpeg|alt=A red and white striped lighthouse emitting beams of light made of white dots, set against a dark, textured sea and sky background.|The name of a location Wiki Object.jpeg|alt=A red ruby jewell, with a golden border. The background is a religious building with an alter, stained glass windows, and stone walls.|The name of an object [[w:Help:Galleries|Galleries]] with [[w:Help:Adding images|images]] are typically used to show and link to the main important content about your topic. You can link to specific pages or [[w:Help:Categories|categories]] about them, once you have created different ones. To start creating content, you can use these buttons for each one of the content pages:
type=create preload=Template:Product page buttonlabel=New product page width=25 type=create preload=Template:Character page buttonlabel=New character page width=25 type=create preload=Template:Episode page buttonlabel=New episode page width=25 type=create preload=Template:Mission page buttonlabel=New mission page width=25 type=create preload=Template:Location page buttonlabel=New location page width=25 type=create preload=Template:Object page buttonlabel=New object page width=25
==Track your progress== You can use different [[w:Help:Tables|tables]] to collect relevant information about the topic of the wiki and the related products. Be sure to add the [[w:Help:Table Progress Tracking|progress tracking feature]] where appropriate too! It allows all users to keep track of their personal progress related to missions to complete in a video game, episodes from a TV show, book chapters - whatever you can think of! {| class="wikitable sortable" |- ! Name !! Description !! Notes |- | Mission || You have to go to this location and defeat the main boss. Don't forget to prepare your weapons first. || Once defeated, you will be rewarded with a new weapon. |- | Episode || The main characters are going to get married, but a secret from the past will resurface. || Air date |- | Book chapter || In this chapter, the main conflict is starting to be solved. || The number of pages |- | Toy || This product is based on the character from the movie. || Price |} ==Interactive Map== [[w:Help:Interactive Maps|Interactive Maps]] are also a great way to represent the universe from the wiki topic. You can also add markers for points of interest like hidden treasures, boss locations, or quest givers, and use them to mark your progress. [[Special:AllMaps|Take a look at all the Interactive Maps on this wiki]]. ==About== This section serves as an introduction for visitors to the wiki, usually describing the IP itself. You can use it to explain the topic this community is about, [[w:Help:Links|adding links]] to the pages talking about the products or events, characters or real-life people who created the series or franchise. ==Join the conversation== '''Discussions''' is the central meeting place where you can connect with other fans. There you can share news, chat about trending topics, introduce your personal favorite character or content, and talk about what you love most. Ready to connect? [[Special:Forum|Head over to Discussions]] and start the conversation now! ==Helping out== ''Need help building out this community?'' *[[Project:Wiki rules|Rules of this wiki]] *[[Project:Policies|Policies of this wiki]] *[[Project:Accessibility checklist|Accessibility checklist]] *[[w:Help:Getting Started|Getting started]] *[[w:Help:Contributing|How to contribute]] *[[w:Help:Community Management|Managing your community]] *[[w:Help:Growing your wiki|Growing your wiki]] *[[w:Help:Contents|Guides]] *[[w:Help:Index|All Help articles]] You can also be part of the larger Fandom family of communities. Visit [[w:c:community|Fandom's Community Central]]! [[Category:{{SITENAME}}]] __NOTOC__ __noeditsection__ [[Category:Git synced pages]]

Welcome to the '''{{SITENAME}}'''! We're a collaborative community about [[Shinto]] created by fans and for fans like you! This wiki is an online encyclopedia which [[w:Help:Editing|anyone can edit]] and contribute to, [[Special:CreatePage|creating a new page]] or [[Special:AllPages|improving an existing one]]. If you're new and don't know where to start, feel free to reach out to one of our [[Special:ListUsers/sysop|administrators]] or check out [[w:Help:Getting Started|these Fandom help pages]]! ==Important articles== Itsukushima Gate.jpg|alt=Stylized text reading "PRODUCT LOGO" in bold, multi-colored letters with a vintage texture, set against a deep purple background filled with stars and abstract geometric shapes.|The name of the product Amaterasu cave crop.jpg|alt=A knight wearing golden armor, holding a sword with a pink hilt pointing down. The background is a brown, hazy wooded area with a stone building.|The name of a character Wiki Episode.jpeg|alt=A detective in a trench coat and fedora holding a flashlight and magnifying glass, rendered in purple and blue tones with a halftone texture against a dark window backdrop.|The name of an episode Wiki Mission.jpeg|alt=Two swords clashing, one with a turquoise blade, the other dark blue. The background is a grey. barren, grassy area, with dead trees.|The name of a mission Wiki Location.jpeg|alt=A red and white striped lighthouse emitting beams of light made of white dots, set against a dark, textured sea and sky background.|The name of a location Wiki Object.jpeg|alt=A red ruby jewell, with a golden border. The background is a religious building with an alter, stained glass windows, and stone walls.|The name of an object [[w:Help:Galleries|Galleries]] with [[w:Help:Adding images|images]] are typically used to show and link to the main important content about your topic. You can link to specific pages or [[w:Help:Categories|categories]] about them, once you have created different ones. To start creating content, you can use these buttons for each one of the content pages:
type=create preload=Template:Product page buttonlabel=New product page width=25 type=create preload=Template:Character page buttonlabel=New character page width=25 type=create preload=Template:Episode page buttonlabel=New episode page width=25 type=create preload=Template:Mission page buttonlabel=New mission page width=25 type=create preload=Template:Location page buttonlabel=New location page width=25 type=create preload=Template:Object page buttonlabel=New object page width=25
==Track your progress== You can use different [[w:Help:Tables|tables]] to collect relevant information about the topic of the wiki and the related products. Be sure to add the [[w:Help:Table Progress Tracking|progress tracking feature]] where appropriate too! It allows all users to keep track of their personal progress related to missions to complete in a video game, episodes from a TV show, book chapters - whatever you can think of! {| class="wikitable sortable" |- ! Name !! Description !! Notes |- | Mission || You have to go to this location and defeat the main boss. Don't forget to prepare your weapons first. || Once defeated, you will be rewarded with a new weapon. |- | Episode || The main characters are going to get married, but a secret from the past will resurface. || Air date |- | Book chapter || In this chapter, the main conflict is starting to be solved. || The number of pages |- | Toy || This product is based on the character from the movie. || Price |} ==Interactive Map== [[w:Help:Interactive Maps|Interactive Maps]] are also a great way to represent the universe from the wiki topic. You can also add markers for points of interest like hidden treasures, boss locations, or quest givers, and use them to mark your progress. [[Special:AllMaps|Take a look at all the Interactive Maps on this wiki]]. ==About== This section serves as an introduction for visitors to the wiki, usually describing the IP itself. You can use it to explain the topic this community is about, [[w:Help:Links|adding links]] to the pages talking about the products or events, characters or real-life people who created the series or franchise. ==Join the conversation== '''Discussions''' is the central meeting place where you can connect with other fans. There you can share news, chat about trending topics, introduce your personal favorite character or content, and talk about what you love most. Ready to connect? [[Special:Forum|Head over to Discussions]] and start the conversation now! ==Helping out== ''Need help building out this community?'' *[[Project:Wiki rules|Rules of this wiki]] *[[Project:Policies|Policies of this wiki]] *[[Project:Accessibility checklist|Accessibility checklist]] *[[w:Help:Getting Started|Getting started]] *[[w:Help:Contributing|How to contribute]] *[[w:Help:Community Management|Managing your community]] *[[w:Help:Growing your wiki|Growing your wiki]] *[[w:Help:Contents|Guides]] *[[w:Help:Index|All Help articles]] You can also be part of the larger Fandom family of communities. Visit [[w:c:community|Fandom's Community Central]]! [[Category:{{SITENAME}}]] __NOTOC__ __noeditsection__ [[Category:Git synced pages]]

revision.comment: manual sync because glitch race condition
revision.text:
Welcome to the '''{{SITENAME}}'''! We're a collaborative reference on [[Shinto]], Japan's indigenous religious tradition — covering [[Kami|kami]], [[Shinto shrine|shrines]], [[Matsuri|festivals]], [[Kannushi|priesthood]], and the classical texts. This wiki is an online encyclopedia which [[w:Help:Editing|anyone can edit]] and contribute to, [[Special:CreatePage|creating a new page]] or [[Special:AllPages|improving an existing one]]. If you're new and don't know where to start, feel free to reach out to one of our [[Special:ListUsers/sysop|administrators]] or check out [[w:Help:Getting Started|these help pages]]! ==Important articles== Itsukushima Gate.jpg|alt=A vermilion torii gate standing in the sea at Itsukushima, framed by wooded mountains.|[[Itsukushima Shrine]] — one of Japan's most iconic shrines Amaterasu cave crop.jpg|alt=A woodblock-style depiction of the sun goddess Amaterasu emerging from a rock cave surrounded by other kami.|[[Amaterasu]] emerging from the [[Amano-Iwato]] cave Wiki Episode.jpeg|alt=Interior view of a shrine hall with tatami flooring.|[[Shinto shrine|Shrine architecture]] and the parts of a shrine Wiki Mission.jpeg|alt=A shrine priest in white robes performing a purification ritual.|[[Kannushi|Priests]] and [[Matsuri|festivals]] Wiki Location.jpeg|alt=A wooded path leading to a shrine gate.|[[Ise Grand Shrine]], [[Izumo-taisha]], and other sacred sites Wiki Object.jpeg|alt=A bronze mirror displayed on a shrine altar.|The [[Three Sacred Treasures]] and other ritual objects The [[w:Help:Galleries|gallery]] above links to articles that cover the wiki's main areas — [[Shinto shrine|shrines]], [[Kami|deities]], [[Matsuri|festivals]], ritual, and sacred texts. To start new pages in any of these areas, use the buttons below:
type=create preload=Template:Shrine page buttonlabel=New shrine page width=25 type=create preload=Template:Kami page buttonlabel=New kami page width=25 type=create preload=Template:Festival page buttonlabel=New festival page width=25 type=create preload=Template:Ritual page buttonlabel=New ritual page width=25 type=create preload=Template:Text page buttonlabel=New text/scripture page width=25 type=create preload=Template:Sacred object page buttonlabel=New sacred object page width=25
==Track your progress== The [[w:Help:Tables|table]] below lists some of Japan's most historically and religiously significant shrines. Use the [[w:Help:Table Progress Tracking|progress tracking feature]] to mark which ones you've visited on pilgrimage or would like to see. {| class="wikitable sortable" |- ! Shrine !! Location !! Notes |- | [[Ise Grand Shrine]] || Mie Prefecture || The most sacred shrine in Shinto, dedicated to [[Amaterasu]]; rebuilt every 20 years in the [[Shikinen Sengū]] tradition |- | [[Izumo-taisha]] || Shimane Prefecture || One of the oldest and most important shrines, dedicated to [[Ōkuninushi]] |- | [[Itsukushima Shrine]] || Hiroshima Prefecture || Famous for its "floating" torii gate in the sea; UNESCO World Heritage Site |- | [[Fushimi Inari-taisha]] || Kyoto Prefecture || Head shrine of [[Inari]]; known for thousands of vermilion torii forming forest tunnels |- | [[Meiji Shrine]] || Tokyo || Dedicated to the deified spirits of Emperor Meiji and Empress Shōken |- | [[Atsuta Shrine]] || Aichi Prefecture || Houses one of the [[Three Sacred Treasures]], the sword [[Kusanagi-no-Tsurugi]] |} ==Interactive Map== [[w:Help:Interactive Maps|Interactive Maps]] are a great way to explore the geography of Shinto. Markers can locate [[Shinto shrine|shrines]], sacred mountains, and other sites of religious significance across Japan — from [[Ise Grand Shrine|Ise]] and [[Izumo-taisha|Izumo]] to the [[Fushimi Inari-taisha|Fushimi Inari]] torii paths. [[Special:AllMaps|Take a look at all the Interactive Maps on this wiki]]. ==About== [[Shinto]] (神道, ''the way of the kami'') is the indigenous religious tradition of Japan. It centres on the veneration of [[Kami]] — sacred spirits associated with nature, ancestors, historical figures, and specific places — through rituals, festivals, and observances performed at [[Shrine|shrines]]. Shinto has no founder, no canonical scripture, and no fixed doctrine; instead it is a living tradition preserved through practice and through classical texts like the [[Kojiki]], the [[Nihon Shoki]], and the [[Engishiki]]. Core starting points on this wiki: * '''[[Shinto]]''' — the tradition itself: its history, practice, and schools * '''[[Kami]]''' — the spirits and deities venerated in Shinto, including [[Amaterasu]], [[Susanoo]], [[Tsukuyomi]], [[Inari]], [[Hachiman]], and countless others * '''[[Shrine]]''' / '''[[Jinja]]''' — sacred architecture, [[Torii]] gates, and famous sites like [[Ise Grand Shrine]] and [[Izumo-taisha]] * '''[[Matsuri]]''' — the festival calendar * '''[[Kannushi]]''', '''[[Miko]]''' — priests and shrine attendants * '''[[Kojiki]]''', '''[[Nihon Shoki]]''', '''[[Engishiki]]''' — the foundational classical texts ==Join the conversation== '''Discussions''' is a place to connect with other contributors and readers interested in Shinto. Share questions about practice and belief, discuss recent edits, suggest new articles, or swap notes from visits to shrines and festivals. Ready to connect? [[Special:Forum|Head over to Discussions]] and start the conversation now! ==Helping out== ''Need help building out this community?'' *[[Project:Wiki rules|Rules of this wiki]] *[[Project:Policies|Policies of this wiki]] *[[Project:Accessibility checklist|Accessibility checklist]] *[[w:Help:Getting Started|Getting started]] *[[w:Help:Contributing|How to contribute]] *[[w:Help:Community Management|Managing your community]] *[[w:Help:Growing your wiki|Growing your wiki]] *[[w:Help:Contents|Guides]] *[[w:Help:Index|All Help articles]] You can also be part of the larger Fandom family of communities. Visit [[w:c:community|Fandom's Community Central]]! [[Category:{{SITENAME}}]] __NOTOC__ __noeditsection__ [[Category:Git synced pages]]

Welcome to the '''{{SITENAME}}'''! We're a collaborative reference on [[Shinto]], Japan's indigenous religious tradition — covering [[Kami|kami]], [[Shinto shrine|shrines]], [[Matsuri|festivals]], [[Kannushi|priesthood]], and the classical texts. This wiki is an online encyclopedia which [[w:Help:Editing|anyone can edit]] and contribute to, [[Special:CreatePage|creating a new page]] or [[Special:AllPages|improving an existing one]]. If you're new and don't know where to start, feel free to reach out to one of our [[Special:ListUsers/sysop|administrators]] or check out [[w:Help:Getting Started|these help pages]]! ==Important articles== Itsukushima Gate.jpg|alt=A vermilion torii gate standing in the sea at Itsukushima, framed by wooded mountains.|[[Itsukushima Shrine]] — one of Japan's most iconic shrines Amaterasu cave crop.jpg|alt=A woodblock-style depiction of the sun goddess Amaterasu emerging from a rock cave surrounded by other kami.|[[Amaterasu]] emerging from the [[Amano-Iwato]] cave Wiki Episode.jpeg|alt=Interior view of a shrine hall with tatami flooring.|[[Shinto shrine|Shrine architecture]] and the parts of a shrine Wiki Mission.jpeg|alt=A shrine priest in white robes performing a purification ritual.|[[Kannushi|Priests]] and [[Matsuri|festivals]] Wiki Location.jpeg|alt=A wooded path leading to a shrine gate.|[[Ise Grand Shrine]], [[Izumo-taisha]], and other sacred sites Wiki Object.jpeg|alt=A bronze mirror displayed on a shrine altar.|The [[Three Sacred Treasures]] and other ritual objects The [[w:Help:Galleries|gallery]] above links to articles that cover the wiki's main areas — [[Shinto shrine|shrines]], [[Kami|deities]], [[Matsuri|festivals]], ritual, and sacred texts. To start new pages in any of these areas, use the buttons below:
type=create preload=Template:Shrine page buttonlabel=New shrine page width=25 type=create preload=Template:Kami page buttonlabel=New kami page width=25 type=create preload=Template:Festival page buttonlabel=New festival page width=25 type=create preload=Template:Ritual page buttonlabel=New ritual page width=25 type=create preload=Template:Text page buttonlabel=New text/scripture page width=25 type=create preload=Template:Sacred object page buttonlabel=New sacred object page width=25
==Track your progress== The [[w:Help:Tables|table]] below lists some of Japan's most historically and religiously significant shrines. Use the [[w:Help:Table Progress Tracking|progress tracking feature]] to mark which ones you've visited on pilgrimage or would like to see. {| class="wikitable sortable" |- ! Shrine !! Location !! Notes |- | [[Ise Grand Shrine]] || Mie Prefecture || The most sacred shrine in Shinto, dedicated to [[Amaterasu]]; rebuilt every 20 years in the [[Jingū Shikinen Sengū|Shikinen Sengū]] tradition |- | [[Izumo-taisha]] || Shimane Prefecture || One of the oldest and most important shrines, dedicated to [[Ōkuninushi]] |- | [[Itsukushima Shrine]] || Hiroshima Prefecture || Famous for its "floating" torii gate in the sea; UNESCO World Heritage Site |- | [[Fushimi Inari-taisha]] || Kyoto Prefecture || Head shrine of [[Inari]]; known for thousands of vermilion torii forming forest tunnels |- | [[Meiji Jingu|Meiji Shrine]]|| Tokyo || Dedicated to the deified spirits of Emperor Meiji and Empress Shōken |- | [[Atsuta Shrine]] || Aichi Prefecture || Houses one of the [[Three Sacred Treasures]], the sword [[Kusanagi no Tsurugi|Kusanagi-no-Tsurugi]] |} ==Interactive Map== [[w:Help:Interactive Maps|Interactive Maps]] are a great way to explore the geography of Shinto. Markers can locate [[Shinto shrine|shrines]], sacred mountains, and other sites of religious significance across Japan — from [[Ise Grand Shrine|Ise]] and [[Izumo-taisha|Izumo]] to the [[Fushimi Inari-taisha|Fushimi Inari]] torii paths. [[Special:AllMaps|Take a look at all the Interactive Maps on this wiki]]. ==About== [[Shinto]] (神道, ''the way of the kami'') is the indigenous religious tradition of Japan. It centres on the veneration of [[Kami]] — sacred spirits associated with nature, ancestors, historical figures, and specific places — through rituals, festivals, and observances performed at [[Shrine|shrines]]. Shinto has no founder, no canonical scripture, and no fixed doctrine; instead it is a living tradition preserved through practice and through classical texts like the [[Kojiki]], the [[Nihon Shoki]], and the [[Engishiki]]. Core starting points on this wiki: * '''[[Shinto]]''' — the tradition itself: its history, practice, and schools * '''[[Kami]]''' — the spirits and deities venerated in Shinto, including [[Amaterasu]], [[Susanoo]], [[Tsukuyomi]], [[Inari]], [[Hachiman]], and countless others * '''[[Shrine]]''' / '''[[Jinja]]''' — sacred architecture, [[Torii]] gates, and famous sites like [[Ise Grand Shrine]] and [[Izumo-taisha]] * '''[[Matsuri]]''' — the festival calendar * '''[[Kannushi]]''', '''[[Miko]]''' — priests and shrine attendants * '''[[Kojiki]]''', '''[[Nihon Shoki]]''', '''[[Engishiki]]''' — the foundational classical texts ==Join the conversation== '''Discussions''' is a place to connect with other contributors and readers interested in Shinto. Share questions about practice and belief, discuss recent edits, suggest new articles, or swap notes from visits to shrines and festivals. Ready to connect? [[Special:Forum|Head over to Discussions]] and start the conversation now! ==Helping out== ''Need help building out this community?'' *[[Project:Wiki rules|Rules of this wiki]] *[[Project:Policies|Policies of this wiki]] *[[Project:Accessibility checklist|Accessibility checklist]] *[[w:Help:Getting Started|Getting started]] *[[w:Help:Contributing|How to contribute]] *[[w:Help:Community Management|Managing your community]] *[[w:Help:Growing your wiki|Growing your wiki]] *[[w:Help:Contents|Guides]] *[[w:Help:Index|All Help articles]] You can also be part of the larger Fandom family of communities. Visit [[w:c:community|Fandom's Community Central]]! [[Category:{{SITENAME}}]] __NOTOC__ __noeditsection__ [[Category:Git synced pages]]

Welcome to the '''{{SITENAME}}'''! We're a collaborative reference on [[Shinto]], Japan's indigenous religious tradition — covering [[Kami|kami]], [[Shinto shrine|shrines]], [[Matsuri|festivals]], [[Kannushi|priesthood]], and the classical texts. This wiki is an online encyclopedia which [[w:Help:Editing|anyone can edit]] and contribute to, [[Special:CreatePage|creating a new page]] or [[Special:AllPages|improving an existing one]]. If you're new and don't know where to start, feel free to reach out to one of our [[Special:ListUsers/sysop|administrators]] or check out [[w:Help:Getting Started|these help pages]]! ==Important articles== Itsukushima Gate.jpg|alt=A vermilion torii gate standing in the sea at Itsukushima, framed by wooded mountains.|[[Itsukushima Shrine]] — one of Japan's most iconic shrines Amaterasu cave crop.jpg|alt=A woodblock-style depiction of the sun goddess Amaterasu emerging from a rock cave surrounded by other kami.|[[Amaterasu]] emerging from the [[Amano-Iwato]] cave Wiki Episode.jpeg|alt=Interior view of a shrine hall with tatami flooring.|[[Shinto shrine|Shrine architecture]] and the parts of a shrine Wiki Mission.jpeg|alt=A shrine priest in white robes performing a purification ritual.|[[Kannushi|Priests]] and [[Matsuri|festivals]] Wiki Location.jpeg|alt=A wooded path leading to a shrine gate.|[[Ise Grand Shrine]], [[Izumo-taisha]], and other sacred sites Wiki Object.jpeg|alt=A bronze mirror displayed on a shrine altar.|The [[Imperial Regalia of Japan|Three Sacred Treasures]] and other ritual objects The [[w:Help:Galleries|gallery]] above links to articles that cover the wiki's main areas — [[Shinto shrine|shrines]], [[Kami|deities]], [[Matsuri|festivals]], ritual, and sacred texts. To start new pages in any of these areas, use the buttons below:
type=create preload=Template:Shrine page buttonlabel=New shrine page width=25 type=create preload=Template:Kami page buttonlabel=New kami page width=25 type=create preload=Template:Festival page buttonlabel=New festival page width=25 type=create preload=Template:Ritual page buttonlabel=New ritual page width=25 type=create preload=Template:Text page buttonlabel=New text/scripture page width=25 type=create preload=Template:Sacred object page buttonlabel=New sacred object page width=25
==Track your progress== The [[w:Help:Tables|table]] below lists some of Japan's most historically and religiously significant shrines. Use the [[w:Help:Table Progress Tracking|progress tracking feature]] to mark which ones you've visited on pilgrimage or would like to see. {| class="wikitable sortable" |- ! Shrine !! Location !! Notes |- | [[Ise Grand Shrine]] || Mie Prefecture || The most sacred shrine in Shinto, dedicated to [[Amaterasu]]; rebuilt every 20 years in the [[Jingū Shikinen Sengū|Shikinen Sengū]] tradition |- | [[Izumo-taisha]] || Shimane Prefecture || One of the oldest and most important shrines, dedicated to [[Ōkuninushi]] |- | [[Itsukushima Shrine]] || Hiroshima Prefecture || Famous for its "floating" torii gate in the sea; UNESCO World Heritage Site |- | [[Fushimi Inari-taisha]] || Kyoto Prefecture || Head shrine of [[Inari]]; known for thousands of vermilion torii forming forest tunnels |- | [[Meiji Jingu|Meiji Shrine]]|| Tokyo || Dedicated to the deified spirits of Emperor Meiji and Empress Shōken |- | [[Atsuta Shrine]] || Aichi Prefecture || Houses one of the [[Imperial Regalia of Japan|Three Sacred Treasures]], the sword [[Kusanagi no Tsurugi|Kusanagi-no-Tsurugi]] |} ==Interactive Map== [[w:Help:Interactive Maps|Interactive Maps]] are a great way to explore the geography of Shinto. Markers can locate [[Shinto shrine|shrines]], sacred mountains, and other sites of religious significance across Japan — from [[Ise Grand Shrine|Ise]] and [[Izumo-taisha|Izumo]] to the [[Fushimi Inari-taisha|Fushimi Inari]] torii paths. [[Special:AllMaps|Take a look at all the Interactive Maps on this wiki]]. ==About== [[Shinto]] (神道, ''the way of the kami'') is the indigenous religious tradition of Japan. It centres on the veneration of [[Kami]] — sacred spirits associated with nature, ancestors, historical figures, and specific places — through rituals, festivals, and observances performed at [[Shrine|shrines]]. Shinto has no founder, no canonical scripture, and no fixed doctrine; instead it is a living tradition preserved through practice and through classical texts like the [[Kojiki]], the [[Nihon Shoki]], and the [[Engishiki]]. Core starting points on this wiki: * '''[[Shinto]]''' — the tradition itself: its history, practice, and schools * '''[[Kami]]''' — the spirits and deities venerated in Shinto, including [[Amaterasu]], [[Susanoo]], [[Tsukuyomi]], [[Inari]], [[Hachiman]], and countless others * '''[[Shrine]]''' / '''[[Jinja]]''' — sacred architecture, [[Torii]] gates, and famous sites like [[Ise Grand Shrine]] and [[Izumo-taisha]] * '''[[Matsuri]]''' — the festival calendar * '''[[Kannushi]]''', '''[[Miko]]''' — priests and shrine attendants * '''[[Kojiki]]''', '''[[Nihon Shoki]]''', '''[[Engishiki]]''' — the foundational classical texts ==Join the conversation== '''Discussions''' is a place to connect with other contributors and readers interested in Shinto. Share questions about practice and belief, discuss recent edits, suggest new articles, or swap notes from visits to shrines and festivals. Ready to connect? [[Special:Forum|Head over to Discussions]] and start the conversation now! ==Helping out== ''Need help building out this community?'' *[[Project:Wiki rules|Rules of this wiki]] *[[Project:Policies|Policies of this wiki]] *[[Project:Accessibility checklist|Accessibility checklist]] *[[w:Help:Getting Started|Getting started]] *[[w:Help:Contributing|How to contribute]] *[[w:Help:Community Management|Managing your community]] *[[w:Help:Growing your wiki|Growing your wiki]] *[[w:Help:Contents|Guides]] *[[w:Help:Index|All Help articles]] You can also be part of the larger Fandom family of communities. Visit [[w:c:community|Fandom's Community Central]]! [[Category:{{SITENAME}}]] __NOTOC__ __noeditsection__ [[Category:Git synced pages]]
